notes: Better performance than the Linux native version
title: HITMAN™

notes: Better performances using Proton 4.11-4 than with the Linux "native"/compatible version (~15% gain with max settings). I suppose the DXVK translation layer outperforms the proprietary solution used in the official port of the game.
title: HITMAN™

notes: Runs pretty well with Proton. There are a few hang but that due to Navi 10 drivers not entirely finished (using cutting edge drivers from mesa-git on Arch) but I'm pretty impressed that those drivers runs correctly for a pretty new video card :)
title: HITMAN™
